title: Flowable IDM API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions extracted from the Flowable IDM OpenAPI specification

userId.description: The id of the user that the token belongs to

tenantId.description: The id of the tenant that the token belongs to

creationTime.description: The creation time of the token in ISO 8601 format

expirationTime.description: The expiry time of the token in ISO 8601 format

url.description: The public URL of the application

Application.description: The applications that the user has access to

labelKey.description: The key for the label of filter

defaultLabelName.description: The default name of the filter label

defaultFilter.description: Flag indicating whether this filter is a default one

ContactFilterResponse.description: The response for the contact filters

validFor.description: A positive ISO 8601 duration for which the token should be valid for. Mutually exclusive with validFor

validUntil.description: The ISO 8601 date until the token should be valid. Mutually exclusive with validFor

CreateAccessTokenRequest.description: Request for creating an access token for a user

userId.description: The id of the user that the token belongs to

tenantId.description: The id of the tenant that the token belongs to

creationTime.description: The creation time of the token in ISO 8601 format

expirationTime.description: The expiry time of the token in ISO 8601 format

value.description: The value of the token. This is only visible when the token is created. Afterwards it cannot be retrieved.

CreateAccessTokenResponse.description: Response for a newly created access token

firstName.description: The first name if the user

lastName.description: The last name of the user

displayName.description: The display name of the user

tenantId.description: The tenant id of the user

avatarId.description: The optional avatar if of the user.

type.description: The optional type of the user

subType.description: The optional subType of the user

subState.description: The optional sub state of the user

presence.description: The optional presence state of the user. Known states: available, away, offline, out-of-office, snoozed

language.description: The optional language for the user

theme.description: The optional theme for the user

userDefinitionId.description: The id of the user definition linked with this user

userDefinitionKey.description: The key of the user definition linked with this user

userDefinitionName.description: The name of the user definition linked with this user

creatorId.description: The id of the user that created this user

creationTime.description: The ISO8601 creation time of this user

updaterId.description: The id of the user that last updated this user

updateTime.description: The ISO8601 last update time of this user

groups.description: Collection of all groups the user has a membership of

identityInfo.description: Collection of all identity infos for the user

translations.description: Map of translations for the user info

allowedTabs.description: The allowed tabs for the user

allowedFeatures.description: The allowed features for the current user

memberGroups.description: The member groups for the current user

adminType.description: The type of the admin user, if this user is an admin

availableApplications.description: The available applications for the current user

CurrentUserResponse.description: The response for a current user

CurrentUserThemeConfiguration.description: The response for the current user theme configuration

id.description: Only return groups with the given id.

ids.description: Only return groups with the given ids.

key.description: Only return groups with the given key.

keys.description: Only return groups with the given keys.

name.description: Only return groups with the given name.

nameLike.description: Only return groups with a name like the given value.

nameLikeIgnoreCase.description: Only return groups with a name like the given value ignoring case.

type.description: Only return groups with a name like the given type.

member.description: Only return groups which have a member with the given username.

members.description: Only return groups which have members with the given usernames.

includeIdentityInfo.description: Include the group identity info in the response.

tenantId.description: Only return groups with the given tenant ID.

GroupQueryRequest.description: Request that is used for querying groups.

users.description: Collection of all users that have a membership with the group

privileges.description: Collection of all privileges for this group

identityInfo.description: Collection of all identity infos for the group

id.description: The id of the user doing the impersonation

OriginalAuthentication.description: The original authentication for a current user.

firstName.description: The first name if the user

lastName.description: The last name of the user

displayName.description: The display name of the user

tenantId.description: The tenant id of the user

avatarId.description: The optional avatar if of the user.

type.description: The optional type of the user

subType.description: The optional subType of the user

subState.description: The optional sub state of the user

presence.description: The optional presence state of the user. Known states: available, away, offline, out-of-office, snoozed

language.description: The optional language for the user

theme.description: The optional theme for the user

userDefinitionId.description: The id of the user definition linked with this user

userDefinitionKey.description: The key of the user definition linked with this user

userDefinitionName.description: The name of the user definition linked with this user

creatorId.description: The id of the user that created this user

creationTime.description: The ISO8601 creation time of this user

updaterId.description: The id of the user that last updated this user

updateTime.description: The ISO8601 last update time of this user

groups.description: Collection of all groups the user has a membership of

identityInfo.description: Collection of all identity infos for the user

translations.description: Map of translations for the user info

allowedTabs.description: The allowed tabs for the user

PlatformUserResponse.description: The response for a platform user

snoozeUntil.description: The date until the user should be snoozed in ISO 8601 format

presence.description: The presence that should be set on the user

tenantId.description: The tenant id that should be used for updating the presence. Only admin users can modify this parameter

id.description: The unique id for the user account

userId.description: The id of the user that this account belongs to

tenantId.description: The id of the tenant that this user account belongs to

state.description: The state of the user account

subState.description: The sub state of the user account

businessAccountId.example: WhatsApp business number xyz or WeChat official account
businessAccountId.description: The id of the business account id this user account is linked to

externalUserId.example: The phone number if it is a WhatsApp account or the user-id for a facebook account, etc)
externalUserId.description: The id of the user within the external system

userAccountDefinitionId.description: The id of the user account definition for this user account

creatorId.description: The id of the user that created this account

creationTime.description: The time of creation of this account

updaterId.description: The id of the user that last updated the account

updateTime.description: The time of the last update of this account

firstName.description: The first name if the user

lastName.description: The last name of the user

displayName.description: The display name of the user

UserBaseInformationResponse.description: The response for the User base information

id.description: Only return users with the given id

ids.description: Only return users that match the given ids

idsNotIn.description: Only return users that do not match the given ids

firstName.description: Only return users with the given first name

firstNameLike.description: Only return users with first name like the given value

firstNameLikeIgnoreCase.description: Only return users with first name like the given value ignoring case

lastName.description: Only return users with the given last name

lastNameLike.description: Only return users with last name like the given value

lastNameLikeIgnoreCase.description: Only return users with last name like the given value ignoring case

displayName.description: Only return users with the given display name

displayNameLike.description: Only return users with display name like the given value

displayNameLikeIgnoreCase.description: Only return users with display name like the given value ignoring case

fullNameLike.description: Only return users with full name like the given value

fullNameLikeIgnoreCase.description: Only return users with full name like the given value ignoring case

email.description: Only return users with the given email

emailLike.description: Only return users with email like the given value

state.description: Only return users with the given state

subState.description: Only return users with the given sub state

memberOfGroup.description: Only return users that are member of the given group

memberOfGroups.description: Only return users that are member of any of the given groups

memberOfGroupKey.description: Only return users that are member of the group with the given key

memberOfGroupKeys.description: Only return users that are member of any of the groups with the given keys

includeIdentityInfo.description: Include the extra identity info for the users.

tenantId.description: Only return users within the given tenant. Only super admin users can modify this parameter, otherwise this is the user doing the request.

accessibleByUser.description: Only return users accessible by the given user. Only admin users can modify this parameter, otherwise this is the user doing the request.

accessibleByUserDefinitionKey.description: Only return users accessible by the given user definition. Only admin users can modify this parameter, otherwise this is the user definition of the user doing the request.

UserBodyQueryRequest.description: Request that is used for querying users.

firstName.description: The first name if the user

lastName.description: The last name of the user

displayName.description: The display name of the user

tenantId.description: The tenant id of the user

UserResponse.description: The response for the OSS User
